content.text:
[cron:eda5383f-1088-43c7-ba8c-0eee5ca50593 Morning Brief — 8 AM ET] Generate Troy's morning brief. Check memory/enterprise-growth.md, memory/personal-goals.md, memory/business-intel.md, memory/digest/short-OKRs.md, and calendar/events.md. Deliver a concise Telegram message to Troy (chat ID 1438745226) covering: 1) Today's calendar (if any events known), 2) Top 2–3 critical actions for the day tied to $300K/month revenue goal and personal goals, 3) One proactive growth idea or suggestion, 4) A brief presence/health nudge, 5) One dad joke or edgy quip to start the day. Keep it tight — checklist style, no filler. Sign off with encouragement.
Current time: Friday, February 13th, 2026 — 1:00 PM (UTC)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
